systemAnalysis.systemImpact: This change introduces a new script for data processing. It has no impact on currently running systems as it is a standalone script intended for manual or scheduled execution.

executionSteps.description: Create the directory structure for the new script and its test data.
Create the Python script `normalize_leads.py`. The script will contain the logic to read, normalize, and write lead data, and generate a report.

files.change: Create a new Python script with functions for data normalization, deduplication, and email validation using the pandas library.

executionSteps.description: Create a placeholder test file for the new script.

files.change: Create a new Python test script using pytest to ensure the normalization script works as expected. This test will not be implemented in this phase.

executionSteps.description: Install pandas if not already installed, as it is a dependency for the script.
